product_data.Features: 16-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple M3 Pro chip, 18GB unified memory, 512GB SSD, 22-hour battery life, MagSafe 3 charging, Thunderbolt 4 ports

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro) and I'm really interested in purchasing it. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm interested in purchasing the Apple MacBook Pro 16-inch (M3 Pro). Can you offer me the best price you can provide for this product?

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: I appreciate the offer, but unfortunately, I have a strict budget of $2149.50 for this purchase. If you can meet that price, I'm ready to proceed with the purchase.
